headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: Section  45. Non-Waiver.  The  waiver  of  any  breach  hereof  shall  not  constitute  a  waiver  of  any  subsequent breach of the same provision, or a waiver of any other breach or provision hereof. Failure by the Contractor in any instance to insist upon observance or performance by Subcontractor of any term or condition of the Subcontract shall  not  be  deemed a waiver by Contractor of any such observance or performance. No waiver will be binding upon Contractor unless in writing signed by Contractor, and then will be for the particular instance only. Payment of any sum by Contractor to Subcontractor with knowledge of any breach or default will not be deemed any waiver of such breach or any other breach.
